"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1183-Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj to 1182-Trfc Collision-No Inj by CHP"
"[4] RPS VEH HAS BEEN HIT TWICE "
"[1] RP JUST SAYING SHES GOING TO GET HIT AGAIN"
"[3] RP POSS HEARD A 415 OR SCREAMING FRM TC "
"[1] HEAR D A TC POSS WENT DWON GULLY "
"[53] PER 3A DRVR DISCRETION ON CONTINUING ON A DIRT RD "
"[51] ARE YOU STUCK IN MUD OR DRY DIRT ?"
"[46] 3A XFERED TO SOUTHERN 3A / TRYING TO CONNECT TO LIVE AGENT , STUCK W/ VIRTUAL ASSISTANT"
"[44] No we are not blocking the road at all // We need help being unstuck that is all // Car is running fine just is in a risky situation"
"[43] I UNDERSTAND BUT ARE YOU BLOCKING THE ROAD AT ALL ? // ALSO TRIPPLE A IS ASKING , DO YOU JUST NEED HELP GETTING UNSTUCK OR YOU NEED TO BE TOWED SOMEWHERE"
"[37] LE 3A INQ IF VEH JUST NEEDS HELP GETTING UNSTUCK OR WILL NEED TO BE TOWED TO A DESTINATION "
"[33] 1039 3A CALL # 22319353 , UNKN TOW PROVIDER 20 MIN ETA "

"[32] OF COURSE , YOU GUYS ARE IN A PRETTY RURAL AREA BUT WE ARE TRYING TO GET HELP TO YOU AS SOON AS WE CAN // ARE YOU BLOCKING ANY TRAFFIC LANES // JUST TO CONFIRM THE CAR IS DRIVEABLE YOU JUST NEED ASSISTANCE GETTING UNSTUCK"
"[31] Thank you guys so much, really thought we were gonna have to break out our survival strategies! You are life savers!"
"[25] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1126-Disabled Veh Occupied to 1182-Trfc Collision-No Inj by CHP"
"[20] That would be wonderful! We are stuck in dirt, its making contact on the middle of the undercarriage and lifting up the rear "
"[19] THATS OKAY , JUST SHOW THEM WHEN THEY GET ON SCENE , I CAN START TRIPPLE A FOR YOU JUST TO CONFIRM IS THE VEH STUCK IN ANYTHING ?"
"[17] DO YOU HAVE TRIPPLE A BY ANY CHANCE ? IF NOT I CAN START YOU A TOW TRUCK BUT IT WILL BE AT YOUR OWN EXPENSE YOU WOULD HAVE TO PAY FOR IT"
"[13] WERE YOU INVOLVED IN A CAR ACCIDENT ? I UNDERSTAND YOURE HANGING OFF THE EDGE OF THE CLIFF AND NEED A TOW TRUCK , WE HAVE HELP ON THE WAY TO YOU"
"[11] I have had an accident on Los Burros road and am now half off of the road and the car is dangerously close to the edge of a cliff"
"[5] VEH WILL DRIVE OUT , VERY CLOSE TO GOING OFF CLOFF "
"[4] NOT IN DANGER OF TEDERING OFF WILL NEED 1185 "
"[3] I AM NOT INJ , TRAPPED , STUCK HANGING OFF STEEP LEDGE PASSED TREE BONES "
"[14] FRIENDS ADVSD VEH IS ON BITTERWATER 10 MINS UP FRM KC TWRDS SR25"
"[13] [Notification] [CHP]-MTY CB --- VEH IS A BLK KIA K5 // BRAKES POSS WENT OUT ON THE VEH // FRIENDS OF INVLD IN A CHEV SLV W/ HAZ LIGHTS ON 1097 NOW"
"[11] [Notification] [CHP]-MTY CB --- 1 PTY COP TO ARM AND PER MTY CALL TAKER INVLD SOUNDED HBD // INVLD STATED THE VEH IS TOTALED AND NOT VISIBLE FRM RDWY"
"[8] ANOTHER TEXT TO 911 , USER REQ EMERG SERVICE FOR VEH CRASH LIKELY TO RESULT IN INJ , UNKN HOW MANY OCCUPS "
